metadata.title: Legal Counsel, Legislative Studies & Certified Translation
metadata.description: Official site of Dr. Hassan Hashem Al-Maliki — Specialist Attorney in Financial Law, Legislative Advisory, and Certified Bilingual Legal Translation.

hero.name: Dr. Hassan Hashem Al-Maliki
hero.title: Attorney & Legal Consultant
hero.specialization: Specialist in financial law, legislative studies, and certified legal translation
hero.subheadline: Combining legal expertise, academic depth, and legislative specialisation to deliver counsel grounded in a rigorous understanding of Saudi regulation and international best practice.
hero.panel_text: Advice is shaped through close reading of the law, the facts, and the commercial consequences of each decision — not through generic answers.
hero.counsel_text: Legal counsel grounded in academic scholarship in jurisprudence and practical expertise in financial and legislative law.
hero.profile_alt: Dr. Hassan Hashem Al-Maliki — Licensed Attorney & Legal Consultant

services.title: Areas of Expertise
services.subtitle: Advanced legal services for matters requiring deep legislative understanding and precise, responsible drafting.

financial.title: Financial Law
financial.description: Specialised counsel on equities, securities, and commercial paper, with deep understanding of the regulatory frameworks governing Saudi financial markets.

legislative.title: Legislative Studies
legislative.description: Drafting regulations, preparing policy papers, compliance studies, and legal memoranda for entities aligning their governance with Sharia and international law.

translation.title: Certified Legal Translation
translation.description: Certified legal translation of international contracts and documents between Arabic and English, preserving full regulatory meaning and contractual intent.

istihkam.title: Property & Title Documentation
istihkam.description: Title deed extraction (hujaj al-istihkam), property documentation, and related matters including inheritance, estate disputes, and associated regulatory procedures.

contracts.title: Commercial Contracts
contracts.description: Drafting and reviewing commercial contracts with attention to legal clarity, contractual risk mitigation, and balanced allocation of rights between parties.

foreign_investment.title: Foreign Investment
foreign_investment.description: Comprehensive legal support for foreign investors navigating Saudi regulatory requirements and building appropriate transactional structures for market entry.

about.title: Professional Profile
about.paragraph_1: Dr. Hassan Hashem Ahmed Al-Maliki holds a Doctorate in Usul al-Fiqh (Principles of Islamic Jurisprudence) from the Islamic University of Madinah, a Master's from Umm Al-Qura University, and a Bachelor's in Sharia from Umm Al-Qura University — providing an exceptional scholarly foundation for every legal opinion.
about.paragraph_2: A licensed attorney with the Saudi Ministry of Justice and a core member of the Saudi Bar Association (Licence No. 3531), he brings together specialised legal practice, academic research, and legislative consultancy.
about.paragraph_3: He serves clients from his head office in Jeddah (Al-Sharafiyyah), with advisory coverage extending to Riyadh and Al-Qassim, supporting local companies and international entities seeking grounded guidance on the Saudi market.

academic.title: Academic authority
academic.description: Holder of a Doctorate and a researcher in Islamic jurisprudence and legislation, bringing a depth of scholarly analysis that extends beyond procedural practice to foundational legal understanding.

bilingual.title: Bilingual drafting
bilingual.description: A certified legal translator working in Arabic and English to the same professional standard, suitable for international firms and cross-border contracts.

geographic.title: Wide geographic coverage
geographic.description: Head office in Jeddah with advisory reach extending to Riyadh and Al-Qassim, serving business and investment sectors across the Kingdom.

contact.title: Get in touch when clarity matters
contact.subtitle: For legal consultations, legislative advisory, and certified legal translation, you can begin on WhatsApp or by phone.
contact.location: Jeddah — Al-Sharafiyyah District, Abu Bakr Al-Siddiq Street

footer.membership: Member of the Saudi Bar Association — Licence No. 3531
